owns: which file is this and where did it come from (ISRC/UPC, provider IDs, content_sha256, fingerprint, file location, provenance)
current_focus: v4 intake write-contract (DRAFT, needs review); intake stays v3-native via fixed _stage_redirect_v3_schema until the port lands

sqlite.db: music_v4.db ($TAGSLUT_DB); intake redirects to sibling music_v3.db ($TAGSLUT_V3_DB) — v4 write-side not built yet
sqlite.writer_policy: SINGLE WRITER = slut only. F-014 hag writers RETIRED to _retired/; @stamps_v4 sentinel wired to check, decorators on write commands + launchd job still pending.
sqlite.intake_from_hag: hag hands slut SQL or a payloads file; slut snapshots, validates, then applies (as with the 18,492 spotify_id aliases)

notes: Machine snapshot. Human current-state is STATE.md (slut root + shared/STATE.md). Durable history is handoffs/handoff.jsonl; locked decisions are DECISIONS_LOCKED.
